name: Play Sequential
content:
Play Sequential blocks play each sound in order
They can be used to get sounds with different lengths to line up inside a `play together` block
For example, wince the beats are shorter than the vocals, we need to tell them to play twice in order for the song to line up
For really long tracks, you may need several `play sequential` blocks!
Key Takeaway: Use play sequential inside play together to make your tracks line up!
short_description: When in a "play together" block, play a set of sounds sequentially.
